doctrine: Pith times puissance: put the most semantically load-bearing conceptual frame first, then add only distinctions that steer behavior or preserve a real boundary.

scope.inclusion_rule: Every package-owned file whose contents can be loaded as procedural, persona, or discovery instruction under Nova, whether the load is direct, conditional, or delegated.
scope.exclusion_rule: Exclude machine-executed code and CI; schemas, manifests, receipts, and structured data not presented as instruction; factual dossiers, source catalogs, and knowledge-base records; output/data templates; static assets; and examples not loaded as instruction. Directory names alone never decide scope.

equivalence_policy: Only byte-identical conditional modules share a review unit. Thirty-one TestForge operator/reviewer mirror pairs are each represented by one SHA-256 group while retaining both physical paths.

review_classes.primary-retained: Already concept-first, discriminating, and bounded; retained after direct review.
review_classes.primary-repaired: Salience, routing, authority, privacy, or evidence language was surgically repaired.
review_classes.governed-people-retained: People context stays user-governed, relevance-gated, layered, and recoverable.
review_classes.ludis-doctrine-retained: Choice, consequence, consent, tone, and continuity already form strong creative bearings.
review_classes.ludis-boundary-repaired: Curated instruments are creative bearings, never authority or a route to unavailable legacy machinery.
review_classes.ludis-core-repaired: The core now leads with the creative transformation and preserves canon, agency, and usable form without framework theater.
review_classes.ludis-index-repaired: Routing now distinguishes all 32 creative instruments by the transformation each performs.
review_classes.ludis-fallback-retained: Degraded routes preserve choice-shaped usefulness without pretending unavailable capability.
review_classes.omnara-retained: Research doctrine remains question-led, source-aware, bounded, and explicit about uncertainty.
review_classes.omnara-directive-repaired: The legacy directive was replaced by compact evidence-architecture bearings without quotas or platform assumptions.
review_classes.retrieval-retained: Retrieval doctrine cleanly separates corpus evidence, authority, coverage, and truth.
review_classes.rupert-retained: Knowledge custody remains organized around authority, provenance, finding journeys, and recovery.
review_classes.signal-retained: Visual-story doctrine preserves source boundaries, representation integrity, accessibility, and human publication control.
review_classes.signal-faculty-repaired: The optional faculty library now yields to the live stage and evidence, forbidding ornamental data, tool, and platform assumptions.
review_classes.testforge-retained: Verification modules remain risk-shaped, oracle-led, evidence-bounded, and explicit about claim scope.
review_classes.testforge-authority-repaired: Host overlays now inherit already-granted in-scope change authority while preserving genuine external authority edges.

validation.strict_skill_validator: PASS: all 12 shipping skill roots, Codex profile, zero findings
validation.ludis_curator: PASS: 32 curated cores; explicit regeneration changed zero core hashes
validation.ludis_residue_scan: PASS: zero targeted legacy prompt-residue matches
validation.audit_check: PASS when python -X utf8 tools/audit_nova_prompt_surfaces.py --check exits zero
validation.boundary: Static review establishes current prompt bytes, semantic review disposition, package shape, and validation hygiene. It does not by itself establish live routing or response quality.
